Local patch (NOT yet upstream — 2026-07-02):
  Added `CommissionerChangelogEntry` + `DivisionDescription.changelog` /
  `DivisionCommissionerDescriptionPublic.changelog` (common/protocol.py,
  common/models.py) so the Prime commissioner can publish a self-authored
  changelog via `describe_division`. The canonical source of truth is
  `Metta-AI/metta` packages/coworld/src/coworld/commissioner/protocol.py and
  app_backend v2 models; land the field in `Metta-AI/commissioners` and re-vendor
  to drop this note.
